core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix High-End Fashion with Cyberpunk Tech.
Emotion First: Every interaction feels 'urgent' and 'exclusive'.
Content is King: Products are heroes. UI recedes into the dark.
Zoom In: Massive product imagery. 80% of the screen is the product.
Negative Space: Luxurious gaps (p-12 to p-32) to create prestige.
anti_patterns: No Gradient Overload. Use darkness as the canvas.
No Center-Everything. Use asymmetrical Bento grids.

grids.product_catalog: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

ProductCard.interaction: Hover: Image scales 1.05x (transition-transform duration-500), Metadata fades in or slides up.

Button.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-violet-500 hover:text-white rounded-none uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300
Button.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4

Navbar.position: Fixed top-0 w-full z-50 border-b border-white/5

iconography.instructions: Use Lucide icons for all UI elements. For marketing sections, scale icons to w-12 h-12 or w-16 h-16 with thin strokes.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on dark backgrounds is at least Zinc-400 or lighter.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT FONTS FIRST: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. THEME ENFORCEMENT: Ensure 'dark' class is always present on HTML or Body tag since we are Dark Mode exclusive.
3. COMPONENT OVERRIDE: Modify standard Shadcn components to remove 'rounded-md' if they clash with our Sharp/Pill aesthetic. We prefer Sharp corners for this brand.
4. AI INTEGRATION: For AI descriptions, use a 'typing effect' or 'glitch text' animation to signify AI generation.
5. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, product cards).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
